meta.title: Effective Engagement with Boards (of Directors)
meta.description:
Don't focus only on your adversaries. Pay attention to your allies, the Board of Directors.

- What is your current state of cyber security? And how is this reported to the board?
- The board often does not know the right questions to ask ... and what the answer should be. Left to their own devices they are not able to understand what are real and material risks.
- The board is responsible for the governance of risk management.
- "Audit findings that can take on a life of their own."
- Cyber security's diffidence with how employees are incentivized.
